title: Forecasted revenue based on timeline

posts.author: gustav.jacobsson (Gustav)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am wondering whether it is possible to forecast revenue based on the timeline. Please see attached picture:

Let’s say that we have contracted value of 100K but we have only worked with it since 1st April and today it is 1st of May (1/5 of total project time), can we show forecasted value as 100*(Timeline) in some way?

Br
Gustav

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@gustav.jacobsson

Yes.

100 * DAYS(TODAY(),{Timeline#Start}) / DAYS({Timeline#End}, {Timeline#Start})

Jim - The Monday Man (YouTube Channel)

posts.author: gustav.jacobsson (Gustav)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you so much !
